title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that most AI agents are unreliable and the industry has normalized broken systems. He contends that error compounding across multi-step workflows makes agents fail at scale, and that reliability matters more than raw performance in shipping agents that work on the first try.
